name: Podina Coriander and Mint Chutney
intro: You really can’t go wrong with a nice podina. It is delicious served really cold with hot homemade bora. Or you can serve it with samosas, papadams, onion bhajis, on top of kebabs… anything really!
method: Put the mint, coriander (cilantro), green chillies and 2 tablespoons of water in a blender and blitz to a paste. Add this to the yoghurt in a bowl and mix until smooth, seasoning with salt. Refrigerate until really cold.
